title: Lostland
description: Alone in a beautiful post-apocalyptic world where zombie are everywhere. Create your colony and survive !
body:
_LostLand drops you into a beautiful yet deadly post-apocalyptic world. Build your colony, master survival, and face relentless zombie hordes in a fully immersive, evolving landscape._



☣️ LostLand: Survive the Aftermath
🌍 A World Fallen to Ruin

Custom World Generation powered by Tectonic and Distance Horizons for breathtaking vistas and immersive landscapes.

Ruined Villages & Abandoned Structures — once thriving towns, now overrun by the undead.

Seasonal Cycles & Harsh Environments — survive changing climates and adapt your strategies.

Immersive Weathering — the world itself evolves over time: structures decay, environments shift, and nature slowly reclaims the land.

🧟 The Zombie Threat

Zombies Are the Only Enemy — no creepers, skeletons, or endermen; just endless hordes of relentless undead.

Smarter, Faster, Deadlier AI — zombies are no longer mindless; they hunt you, break through defenses, and swarm in numbers.

A True Survival Horror Atmosphere — every night, every dark cave, and every ruined street is a fight for your life.

🏡 Rebuild Civilization with MineColonies

Establish your own colony and bring life back to the wasteland.

Recruit settlers, assign jobs, and protect them from the zombie hordes.

Balance survival with leadership as you build farms, defenses, and thriving communities.

⚙️ Innovation Amid the Ruins

Create Mod — power your colony with clever machines, contraptions, and automation.

Optimized Shaders & Visual Enhancements — a ruined world has never looked this hauntingly beautiful.

Immersive Performance — tuned to run smoothly with shaders, detailed horizons, and large colonies.

🔫 Tools of Survival

Guns & Firearms to hold back the undead tide.

Scavenging & Crafting rebalanced for rewarding, tense survival gameplay.

Scarcity and Tension — resources matter, every bullet counts.

🐾 A Touch of Life

Thanks to the Naturalist mod, wildlife still roams the lands — deer, bears, birds, and more — offering both danger and comfort in an otherwise hostile world.

🌀 The Journey Beyond

End Remastered completely reimagines the late game: find and collect a wide variety of unique Ender Eyes scattered across the world.

Unlock the End Portal only after surviving a true scavenger’s hunt across biomes, ruins, and dungeons.

A challenging yet rewarding progression system that makes reaching the End a true achievement.

🧡 A Survival Experience Like No Other

Striking the balance between hardcore survival and cozy colony-building.

Designed for full immersion — the closest Minecraft has ever been to The Walking Dead.

Perfect for solo survivors or friends banding together against the apocalypse.
